creator: seki@sysrap.cs.fujitsu.co.jp
text:
Manual pages for modunload(8) and modstat(8) both list the
following under the "SEE ALSO" section:

lkm(4), modunload(8), modstat(8)

It is a kind of circle.

Also, refereces to modload(8) is missing.

Fix: 

Replace modstat(8) with modload(8) for modstat(8) man page,
and modunload(8) with modload(8) for modunload(8) man page.
How-To-Repeat: man modunload

and/or

man modstat
